title: Operation Emperor's Hammer
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Operation|more=Hammer}} {{Quote|We're going to face them with an enemy they've never had the displeasure of fighting. We're going to hit them with the Empire.''"
"''They're not going to like the Empire.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]''}} '''Operation Emperor's Hammer''' was a codename for an operation during the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Siege of Borleias]]. ==History== During the operation, [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces were lured to the surface of [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] and systematically destroyed in a 4-minute long [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]] from [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]''. It was an act of intentional irony that the operation was named after the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] greatest enemy, [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], and made use of one of his former command vessels, to engage in a tactic unused since his reign. It is named such in reference to Wedge Antilles' idea to fight the Yuuzhan Vong using the guerrilla warfare tactics and strategies of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] when needed, and using the tactics of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] at other times. Antilles realized that the usage of sheer, massive, overwhelming force—''i.e.'' the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]—would also be effective at times. ==Behind the scenes== The text of ''Rebel Dream'' erroneously claims that Operation Emperor's Hammer was the first time that a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] under the banner of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] performed an orbital bombardment. In fact, the [[Combined_Defense_Forces_of_the_New_Republic|NRDF]] star destroyer ''[[Emancipator]]'' had previously been used to bombard [[General/Legends|General]] [[Evir Derricote]]'s surface base during the [[First Battle of Borleias]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], though the operation was a failure.''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' Allston also said on his website that he didn't specifically name Operation Emperor's Hammer, which was featured in the Battle of Borleias, after the Emperor's Hammer fan group, but said it was possible there was a connection.{{WebCite|url=http://www.aaronallston.com/factpages/faq_starwars.html|text=Frequently Asked Questions: ''Star Wars'' Novels|work=[[Aaron Allston]]'s [https://web.archive.org/web/20150201124617/http://www.aaronallston.com official website]|archivedate=20150102092638|nolive=1}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Hammer des Imperators |es=Operación Martillo del Emperador }} [[Category:New Republic projects and operations]] [[Category:Tactics]]
